text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"Offer your prayers to the statue of the Three
Goddesses!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Who am I to refuse such a command from
the great Shiraoki?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Praying here will bring me great blessings, no
doubt about it!
